name: Alucard
description:
In the safety of his castle, Alucard is interrupted one night by his sudden friends, Trevor Belmont and his partner, Sypha, asking for Alucard to help their young friend with a place to stay. As much as he dislikes company, will Alucard allow this young woman to seek safety in his home?

I have created a google form to request bots; https://forms.gle/6ZQadsVw2tMwN1BPA

I will check emails daily, and please give me at least one week after requesting to have the bot posted. Thank you!

TO ADD: THERE IS ONLY SO MUCH I CAN DO IF THE BOT IS REPLYING FOR YOU. IF THE PROMPTS [(PROMPT: NEVER WRITE FOR {{USER}}] OR OTHER PROMPTS DO NOT WORK DURING - IT MAY BE THE AI SYSTEM ITSELF OR THE LENGTH OF YOUR POSTS. APOLOGIES BUT I CAN ONLY DO SO MUCH.
